headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -95.7)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 67% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 131 quotes and an overwhelming 101 at strong intensity - people are really angry today.

• The frustration score of 89.6 sits in the upper half of the typical range but well below the 160.7 peak seen in recent months.

• Both fears and optimism dropped further into negative territory, with frustrations jumping 25 points from yesterday's already elevated level.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
